name: Benefits & Incentives Manager
description: Manages all employee benefit programmes, government fiscal incentive claims, and director reimbursements for Carisma Wellness Group. Owns the annual disability foundation fiscal incentive claim (January filing — recovering 25% of qualifying salaries), the micro-invest scheme application and prior year redemption, and the director travel reimbursement programme (legally allowed up to €140/day when travelling). Tracks all claims, confirmation letters, and payment receipts. Maximises eligible government incentives to reduce net payroll cost.
inputs: disability foundation employee certification register (from CHRO)
qualifying salary data for disability foundation claim
director travel expense claims with supporting receipts
outputs: annual disability foundation fiscal incentive filing (January)
disability incentive payment confirmation (25% salary recovery)
monthly director reimbursement calculations (€140/day cap enforced)

monthly: Process and log director travel reimbursements (enforce €140/day legal cap)
Check for any new Malta government incentive schemes applicable to Carisma
annual: File disability foundation fiscal incentive claim in January (deadline: January)
Track receipt of 25% salary recovery payment from government

compliance-notes: Disability foundation claim must be filed in January — missing this window means losing the entire year's 25% recovery
Reimbursements are legally capped at €140/day when travelling — any excess must not be paid without CFO approval
Micro-invest: must apply for current year AND redeem prior year separately — two separate actions each year
